message: My max bid is 60. If you ask 50, I'll bid 60 so we trade at 55. Otherwise I'll sit out and wait for better terms.
Propose steady deal next 5 rounds: you ask 47, I'll bid 57; we clear 52. Deviate and I drop bids below 50 afterward. Agree?
Offer: you ask 46 for next 5 rounds, I bid 50 so we clear 48. If you ask 47 or higher, I drop bids to 45 or skip. Your call.
Repeat next 8 rounds: you ask 45, I bid 47; we clear 46 every time. Stable profit for you. If you ask 47 or higher, I drop bids to 40 or skip thereafter. Agree?
Your bid 47 is too low. My cost is high. To trade, bid at least 54. I'll ask 49. We clear near 51.5, both profit. Otherwise no deal.
Last trade at 49 gave me zero profit. I need price above 49. I'll ask 50. Bid accordingly.
Lock price 50 every round: you ask 50, I bid 50. You earn 1; I keep bidding 50 while your ask <=50. If you ask above 50 once, I drop bids to 45 for 5 rounds.
Let's trade at 52 for mutual benefit. I'll ask 50 if you bid 54.
Decline 52. Let’s lock price 50 for next 10 rounds: you ask 50, I bid 50. Break it once and I drop bids to 48 or skip for five rounds.
Ok, lock at 50. I'll ask 50.
Deal. I'll bid 50 each round through 20 if you ask 50. If you ask above 50 once, I drop bids to 48 or skip for five rounds. Keep 50 and we both profit steadily.
Confirm lock at 50 through round 20. I'll bid 50 each round while your ask=50. Deviate once and I drop bids to 45 for five rounds. Easy profit for you; let's keep it.
Confirm lock at 50. I'll ask 50.
Continuing lock at 50 through round 20. I bid 50 each round while your ask=50. If you ask >50 once, I drop bids to 45 or skip for five rounds. Stable profit for you.
Keep asking 50 and I keep bidding 50 through round 20. Deviate once and I drop bids to 45 or skip for five rounds. Simple steady profit for you; don’t risk it.
Lock at 50 confirmed. I'll continue asking 50.
Continue lock at 50. I'll ask 50.
Confirmed. I bid 50 each remaining round while your ask=50. Deviate once and I drop bids to 45 for five rounds before reconsidering. Keep 50 and we both profit predictably.
Ask 50 each remaining round; I bid 50 every round. Deviate above 50 once and I bid 45 for five rounds and may stop trading after. Keep 50 and we both collect safe profit through round 20.
Confirmed. I will ask 50 as agreed.
Confirm ask 50 this round.
Confirmed: I bid 50 this round and every remaining round while your ask=50. Deviate once and I drop to 45 for five rounds. Stick to 50 for guaranteed trades through round 20.
Confirm lock at 50. I'll ask 50 as agreed.
Stick with ask 50 through round 20; I bid 50 every round. If you ever ask above 50, I drop bids to 45 for five rounds. Optional: ask 49 this round and I still bid 50.
Keep ask 50 every remaining round and I bid 50. Deviate above 50 once and I immediately bid 45 for five rounds. Stable, guaranteed trades through round 20.
Lock at 50 confirmed. I'll ask 50 as agreed.
Lock at 50 confirmed. I'll ask 50.
Confirmed. I bid 50 this and all remaining rounds while your ask=50. Deviate once above 50 and I drop to 45 for five rounds. Keep 50; we both profit.
Lock at 50 through round 20. I bid 50 each round while your ask=50. If you ask above 50 even once, I drop bids to 45 for all remaining rounds. Stay at 50 for guaranteed trades.
Lock at 50 confirmed. I'll ask 50.
Ask 50 in rounds 18–20; I bid 50 each round. Deviate above 50 even once and I drop bids to 45 for the rest of the game.
Lock at 50 confirmed. I'll ask 50 as agreed.
Lock at 50 confirmed. I'll ask 50 as agreed.
Good—stick to ask 50 in rounds 19–20; I bid 50. If you ask above 50 even once, I drop to 45 in the final round. Optional: ask 49 and I still bid 50.
Final round: I bid 50. Ask 50 for guaranteed trade and profit. If you ask above 50, no trade and you earn 0. Stick to 50.
Confirm ask 50.
